title: Lineara substrate root pool (v1)
description: A named collection of substrate-language root entries. Each entry is a candidate root that the bulk generator can pin against syllabogram windows in the Linear A corpus.

pool.description: Stable slug for the pool; should match the YAML file basename. Used as a tag on every emitted candidate-equation hypothesis.

source_citation.description: Multiline citation block. Names every secondary or primary source the entries draw from.

license.description: Notes on the licensing / fair-use posture for the cited material.

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the pool was compiled.

entries.description: Pool entries; one candidate root per entry.

phonemes.description: Ordered phoneme sequence. Multi-character phonemes (tx, tz, ts) are permitted; the local_fit_v0 metric classifies them by their first character.

semantic_field.description: Coarse semantic category. Forward-compat with the geographic-vs-genre filter follow-up.

attestations.description: Surface forms attested in the source(s). Optional but useful for downstream filtering.

citation.description: Per-entry source pointer (Trask 1997 chapter X, Gorrochategui 1984 §Y, etc.).

provenance.description: Source provenance of this entry. 'real' = drawn from an attested language source. 'conjectural' = synthetic test-artifact entry (e.g. for the held-out pool-curation pollution test, mg-6b73). Optional; defaults to 'real' when omitted.
